violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Food safety manager application given to PIC. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2025

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cheese and margarine) in the refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the freezer have an accumulation of frost and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2023
